description: Database file path or :memory: for in-memory database

title: Disbound Page

description: Array of disbound page objects - each page contains order_index, text_content, optional source_ref, word_count, and character_count

title: Model Download Result
description: Result from a model download operation, including the local path and download metadata

model_spec.description: The model specification that was downloaded (e.g., 'hf:org/model-name')

title: Embedding Vector
description: Output from embedding generation including vectors, chunk metadata, and model information

chunk.description: The document chunk this embedding is for

chunk_index.description: Index of this chunk in the document

start_offset.description: Start byte offset in original document

end_offset.description: End byte offset in original document

description: PNG image data representing a thumbnail preview of a document or media file

description: JSON array containing multiple values or objects

title: LLM Generation Request
description: Request object for LLM text generation containing prompt, model specification, and generation parameters

prompt.description: The input text prompt for generation

model_spec.description: Model specification (HuggingFace repo, local path, or alias)

json_schema.description: JSON schema constraint for structured output

constraint.description: Constraint specification (json_schema, regex, grammar, or tool_call)

title: Generated Text
description: Generated text structured as a map with metadata.

title: LLM Model Info
description: Information about a loaded LLM model including capabilities and parameters

context_length.description: Maximum context length the model supports

supports_chat.description: Whether the model has a chat template

supports_tools.description: Whether the model supports tool use

title: LLM Text Stream
description: Streaming output from LLM text generation. Each line is a JSON object with a 'type' field (token, status, complete, tool_request, or error).

title: LLM Vocabulary Response

description: Minimum memory warning threshold in MB

description: Delay before responding to memory pressure in milliseconds

title: Model Availability
description: Information about a model's availability both locally and in remote repositories

model_spec.description: The model specification that was checked

local_available.description: Whether the model is available locally

remote_available.description: Whether the model is available in the remote repository

local_path.description: Local filesystem path if available locally

last_modified.description: Last modification time if available locally (ISO 8601)

title: Model Contents
description: Complete repository structure with all files and directories for a model

total_size_bytes.description: Total size of all files in bytes

file_count.description: Number of files in the repository

directory_count.description: Number of directories in the repository

all_files.description: Flat list of all files in the repository

size_bytes.description: File size in bytes (null for directories)

local_available.description: Whether this file is locally available

title: Model Dimensionality
description: Dimensionality of a machine learning model (e.g., embedding vector size)

title: Model List
description: List of available models with their metadata and status

local_available.description: Whether the model is available locally

remote_available.description: Whether the model is available remotely

count.description: Total number of models in the list

title: Model Path
description: Local filesystem path to a model directory

path.description: Local filesystem path to the model directory

exists.description: Whether the path exists on the filesystem

title: Model Status
description: Detailed model status including state, download progress, and health information

progress.description: Download progress as a percentage (0.0 to 1.0)

speed_bps.description: Download speed in bytes per second

finished_at.description: When the download/operation completed or failed (ISO 8601)

local_path.description: Local filesystem path if model is available locally

title: Test Edge 1 Arg 1 (Prefix)
description: Optional text to prepend before input content in edge1 transformation

description: Optional text to append after input content in edge2 transformation

description: Optional text to add to each file during folder fan-out processing

description: Text to insert between collected items during fan-in

description: Path to the second input file for multi-input merge

description: Text to insert between merged inputs

description: Number of times to duplicate input when producing list

title: Test Edge 6 Arg 2 (Item Prefix)
description: Text to prepend to each list item

description: Base text content for capchain testing - entry point

title: List of Test Node 1 (Base Text)
description: List of base text content for capchain testing - entry point

title: Test Node 2 (Intermediate Text)
description: Intermediate text content after first transformation

description: Text content after second transformation step

description: List of text items for fan-out/fan-in testing

description: Final merged text output from fan-in operations
